title: Can we get a feature to download Monday Docs?
excerpt: I would love to be able to download Monday docs as pdfs so I can share them via email, but Monday.com doesn’t currently support this. I wanted to phase out my use of google docs with Monday docs, but if I can’t download …

posts.author: ebal578 (Elisabeth Balistreri)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to be able to download Monday docs as pdfs so I can share them via email, but Monday.com doesn’t currently support this. I wanted to phase out my use of google docs with Monday docs, but if I can’t download Monday docs, I won’t be able to do that.

posts.author: galaxia (Juliette)
posts.cookedHtml: Seriously. We were about to migrate all of our manuals and checklists to Monday, but if you can’t export to PDF to create backups or to compile documents and use them outside of Monday, there is no point. Please enable this option!
